scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.smoke:live: node --input-type=module -e "const base=(process.env.SMOKE_URL||'https://versioned-notes.zacyandell.workers.dev').replace(/\/$/,''); const [home,health]=await Promise.all([fetch(base),fetch(base+'/api/health')]); const html=await home.text(); if(!home.ok||!html.includes('Versioned Notes')) throw new Error('Live homepage check failed'); const data=await health.json(); if(!health.ok||!data.ok) throw new Error('Live health check failed'); console.log('Live smoke OK:', base);"
